meta_title: For Students: freelance pitching to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Freelance Pitching to Solve No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Learn how to use freelance pitching to overcome lack of marketing skills. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for developers.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to land your first client. By automating cold outreach and personalized value propositions using Antigravity and Claude Code, you can transform your technical projects into compelling pitches. Focus on solving specific pain points for small businesses rather than 'selling' your coding services.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks mastering React, Python, and API integration, but your portfolio is gathering digital dust. The cold reality of the industry hits hard: building the app is only half the battle. Without a marketing engine, your genius code remains invisible, leaving you stuck in 'tutorial hell' while others secure freelance contracts.

But here is the secret: you don't need a marketing agency. You need a systematized approach to freelance pitching. By treating your outreach like a software build, you can leverage AI agents to identify client pain points and craft hyper-personalized pitches that convert. Let's turn your technical potential into a sustainable income stream.

steps.title: Define Your Niche and Value Prop
steps.description: Identify a specific vertical where your coding skills solve a recurring business problem. You aren't selling 'code'; you are selling 'efficiency'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a technical business strategist. Create a list of 5 small business niches where a custom CRM or automation tool would save at least 10 hours of manual work per week. For each, draft a 2-sentence value proposition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze these 5 niches and output a JSON file containing the top 3 pain points for each.'

steps.title: Build a Lead Scraper Agent
steps.description: Automate the discovery of potential clients using an agentic workflow to find businesses with outdated digital presence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Python script using Playwright to scrape business contact information from Google Maps for local businesses in [Niche] that lack a modern website.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Review the scraper script for performance and add error handling for connection timeouts.'

steps.title: Generate Personalized Outreach Templates
steps.description: Avoid generic 'Dear Sir' emails. Use AI to reference specific features or gaps on their current site to prove you've done the research.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a cold email template that references a specific business problem found in Step 1. The tone should be consultative, not aggressive. Include a placeholder for a 'Proof of Concept' link.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Refactor this email template to be under 150 words and include a clear call to action for a 10-minute discovery call.'

steps.title: Automate the Pitch Delivery
steps.description: Connect your lead database with your email template to send personalized messages at scale without sacrificing quality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script that iterates through a CSV of leads and sends a personalized email using an SMTP library, ensuring each email includes the specific business name and pain point identified.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement a dry-run mode that logs the emails to the console instead of sending them, so I can verify the personalization.'

steps.title: Analyze and Iterate
steps.description: Track open rates and responses to refine your pitch based on real-world data rather than guessing what works.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a dashboard script that parses my sent folder and calculates the open-to-reply ratio. Suggest 3 A/B test variations for the subject line based on the data.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze the current response rate and suggest improvements to the call-to-action based on industry standards for freelance developers.'

pro_tips: Always offer a 'Quick Win' free audit as your first touchpoint to lower the barrier to entry.
Use Loom videos to record a 60-second critique of their current site; it converts 5x higher than text emails.
Never lead with your tech stack; lead with the business outcome (e.g., 'I can save you 15 hours a week').
Time your outreach for Tuesday or Wednesday mornings when decision-makers are clearing their inbox.
Keep a 'Not Yet' list; follow up with prospects who didn't reply after 14 days with a new case study or feature update.
content.next_steps: Once you land your first discovery call, document the entire process in a GitHub repository to build your authority, then move on to building a case study of the project you pitched.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect moment to start marketing yourself. Use the tools that professional developers use to bypass the noise and get straight to the code. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
